evidence.summary: Commit 22330e7 — feat(v0.1.0): bootstrap repo with Constitution v1.0.0, Memory Bank, and template scaffolding. 37 files, 4297 insertions.
Acceptance criterion for v0.1.0: Article I appears at line 13 of constitution.md.tpl. Verified.
Acceptance criterion for v0.1.0: template/.bequite/memory/ contains the six Cline-pattern files + decisions/ + prompts/ + logs/ + receipts/ as .gitkeep'd dirs. Verified.

Eight default Doctrines created and tagged: default-web-saas, cli-tool, ml-pipeline, desktop-tauri, library-package, fintech-pci, healthcare-hipaa, gov-fedramp. mena-bilingual deferred to v0.11.0 per plan. Commit 50ebfe6 — feat(v0.1.1): doctrines pack. 8 files, 1447 insertions.

Master-file merge audit written. Two-layer architecture decision: Harness (current, v0.1.0 → v1.0.0) + Studio (master's monorepo stack, v2.0.0+). 17 master claims classified into Bucket A (adopt now), Bucket B (current wins), Bucket C (merge both), Bucket D (defer to v2.0.0), Bucket E (open items requiring Ahmed). 7 open items identified, none blocking.

note: Until v0.7.0 ships the signed-receipts system, evidence is recorded here as filesystem + git-history references. From v0.7.0 onward, every entry will also carry a `receipt_path` and `receipt_sha256`.
